title: TheDragon's Essence Totem
description: This mod gives you the opportunity to harness the power of every mob in Minecraft
body:

[![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/Give%20a%20Star%20on%20Github-fafbfc?logo=github&logoColor=black)](https://github.com/TheDragonSkull/Essence-Totem-Mod)

[![Modrinth Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/eqvGpeIx?label=Avaliable%20for&color=82ff80)](https://modrinth.com/mod/thedragons-essence-totem) 
[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/eqvGpeIx?logo=modrinth&color=82ff80)](https://modrinth.com/mod/thedragons-essence-totem)

---

📖 About:


This mod gives you the opportunity to harness the power of every mob in Minecraft.

Use the new [*Totem of Essence*](https://github.com/TheDragonSkull/Essence-Totem-Mod/wiki/Totem-of-Essence) to collect the essence of every Minecraft mob, granting special abilities inspired by each creature. Unlock advancements progressing through each category, earn rewards, and complete the ultimate visual prize: the [*Crown of Essence*](https://github.com/TheDragonSkull/Essence-Totem-Mod/wiki/Advancements#-crown-of-essence).

---

⭐ Features:


- **Totem of Essence** → Obtain a mob’s essence and bind it to the Totem, gaining a unique ability related to that mob.
- **Advancements & Rewards** → Each totem unlocks an advancement. Completing categories grants XP and items and bonuses.
- **Crown of Essence** → A permanent visual reward that grows as you complete categories, filling with gems.  

- For more info, visit the mod [Wiki](https://github.com/TheDragonSkull/Essence-Totem-Mod/wiki).

 This mod supports multiplayer.\
 If you find bugs please report so I can try to fix them.

 ---

🖋 Dependencies:

**Forge**

- [Minecraft Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/)

**Curios API**

- [Curios API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios)
